tickets.title: CCTV feed down at Sector 4 Junction
tickets.description: The primary camera feed at Sector 4 chowraha is offline since morning. Appears to be a power or fiber cut issue.

tickets.title: Biometric login failure in PCR Control Room
tickets.description: Multiple officers unable to log in to the biometric system for their shifts. Fingerprint reader is not responding.

tickets.title: Slow internet connectivity in SP Office
tickets.description: Internet connection is running below 5 Mbps, affecting document uploading on the central portal.

tickets.title: UP Cop App sync issues on official mobile devices
tickets.description: Patrolling team reporting that FIR data is not syncing back to the central server from their field tablets.

tickets.title: New workstation installation in Cyber Cell
tickets.description: Need to configure and install two new high-performance systems for forensic analysis.
